name: Pecan Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the eggs, one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Sift together the flour, salt, and baking soda into a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the butter mixture, alternating with the sour cream and vanilla.
5. Fold in the pecans until just combined.
6. Grease and flour a 10-inch Bundt pan.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Sprinkle the remaining pecans on top (optional).
9. Bake at 300°F for approximately two hours, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
